prestazioni: Engine: Lamborghini 3.9L V12 (L390) with forged internals by JE Pistons (9.5:1 compression, 87mm bore, 84mm stroke) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods for 8,500 RPM redline capability, paired with a custom billet crankshaft by Bryant Racing

Forced induction: Single Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger (1.05 A/R turbine housing) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegate and custom 3.5" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Burns Stainless, feeding into a custom 4-into-1 downpipe with GESI catalytic converters (200-cell) for Euro 6 compliance

Fuel and ignition: Full sequential fuel injection system by Motec M150 ECU with dual Bosch 044 fuel pumps, ID1000x injectors, and MSD 8 Plus ignition system with NGK R7437-10 iridium spark plugs, paired with a custom dry-sump oil system by Peterson Fluid Systems (8-quart capacity, 4-stage pump)
estetica: Custom widebody conversion by Touring Superleggera (Milan) with hand-formed aluminum fenders (2.5" wider front, 3.0" wider rear) and integrated side skirts, retaining original Espada GT Touring design language with modernized wheel arches

Bespoke 18" OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (9.5" front, 12" rear) with custom offset (ET15 front, ET5 rear) and Pirelli P Zero Corsa tires (235/40 front, 295/35 rear), wrapped in a custom metallic Verde Ithaca paint with gold leaf pinstriping by Carrozzeria Zanasi

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Saddleback Leather (steering wheel, dashboard, and door cards) with custom embroidered Lamborghini Espada GT Touring logos, paired with a bespoke roll cage by Custom Cages (T45 steel, 6-point) and Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon fiber shells, Alcantara inserts)
